snippet: Cleaning arrangements differ between metropolitan and regional schools. For detailed information, refer to the Cleaning policy . For metropolitan schools, contract cleaning funding is no longer provided directly through the Student Resource Package (SRP). Instead, funds are held centrally, and the department pays cleaning companies directly. For regional schools, contract cleaning funding remains included in the SRP, and based on normal and low-use areas, as determined by the cleanable spaces outlined in the school's facility schedule. Schools will receive additional cleaning funds through the SRP cycle, over and above this contract cleaning entitlement provided through the SRP quarterly grant. Contract cleaning funding does not cover school consumables, such as:
